sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83172" key="pilwta/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῑλ-ωτάριος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n83172.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πιλοποιός</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:49" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.49</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
